title: The Allies Push Forward
description: The rescue group fights through Enies Lobby’s defenses and turns the courthouse into the next major objective.
scene: Across pages 2, 3, 4, 5, this part follows Blueno, Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Chopper. The rescue group fights through Enies Lobby’s defenses and turns the courthouse into the next major objective.
